title: Big Brain currency
description: a mod that adds shops and coins into minecraft.
body:
![title (big brain currency)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5cdd4419173887e55a2ebfb4c4fcbd205a410da.png)


Playing minecraft with friends, sick and tired of giveing away stuff for free. finding that diamonds as currency gets hyper inflated?

With one developer and a couple of big brains we bring you Big Brain Currency, a mod that adds shops and coins into minecraft.

now YOU can also be a heartless CEO



This mod was made for the BigBrainSMP but is here for anyone to use.
